parents.subject: LU-18435 lod: recover layout generation from replay

commit.subject: LU-18486 build: fl_flags removed in 6.8
commit.message:
LU-18486 build: fl_flags removed in 6.8

Linux commit v6.7-rc4-79-gaf7628d6ec19
  fs: convert error_remove_page to error_remove_folio

Provide an abstraction for fl_flags and c.flc_flags

Test-Parameters: forbuildonly
Fixes: 3177b0dc5d ("LU-2525 ldlm: add asynchronous flocks")
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I056a620c8166c6994c49085fc3204a3b8a169859
